title: Kuro’s Ambition Collapses
description: On pages 9–12, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Repent!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: DIE!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: eh...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Please stop joking, Captain Kuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's still not too late to attack the village!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: As long as Jango can make that girl write the will, the plan can still succeed!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You don't have to worry about the plan

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: As long as your corpses are here, I can place all the blame on you

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I never intended to let any of you leave the village alive

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: It would be to my disa- vantage to let anyone who knows about my plans live

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You mean, you planned.... from the very beginning...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: To kill all of us?!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Yes, ever since three years ago, when I was still captain Kuro....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: All this was part of my "plan"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You guys are dumb

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: What a bunch of loser Pirates

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Hmph...! Losers?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: A pirate crew is just a random gathering of outcasted outlaws

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: What could these fools do without my "plan"?!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You should continue to quietly follow my plans!!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: In a pirate fleet, the crew members are just "pawns" for the captain to use as he wishes

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: that means, your life and death are all in my hands

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Even if there's a wall right ahead, you'd still have to follow my orders and charge at it!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: and sacri- rice them- selves for my plan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's the way of a pirate!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: A wander- ing little brat like you would never under- stand!!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: eventhough you're the captain of a ship who controls hundreds of men...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You still can't defeat usopp!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
